overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt entering a medieval brothel establishment. The character walks from an outdoor cobblestone courtyard into a candlelit interior with patrons, then explores a private bathing chamber with red wallpaper.

events.description: character opens wooden door and enters the building

agents.ego_description: walking across cobblestones toward the entrance of the brick building

entered.detail: tall brick exterior wall with multiple stories and gothic architectural details
arched gothic window with colored glass panes emitting warm orange light
dark wooden double door with metal studs and iron hinges
short stone staircase leading up to the entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a brick building at night, walking across a cobblestone courtyard toward a wooden door illuminated by warm light from stained glass windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern main hall with bookshelves and patrons

events.description: transition from dark exterior to warm candlelit interior
turning right to explore deeper into the main hall

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded main hall, observing various patrons and the room's furnishings

notable_agents.action: blonde man in red and black striped outfit standing near the entrance
woman in revealing black outfit seated near the window

entered.detail: tall dark wood bookshelves filled with leather-bound books
gothic window with circular honeycomb patterned glass panes
wall-mounted iron candle holders providing warm flickering light
large wooden shield with red field and white eagle emblem
dark wood tables with brass candlesticks and scattered papers

segments.scene_description: Inside the candlelit main hall, the character explores a room filled with wooden bookshelves, patrons in medieval attire, and heraldic shields on the walls. The space features leaded glass windows and patterned carpets.

scene_state.functional_zone: private bathing chamber with red wallpaper

events.description: entering private back room through wooden doorway

agents.ego_description: examining the private chamber, walking around the copper bathtub and dressing area

notable_agents.action: woman bathing in the copper tub
woman sitting at dressing table applying makeup

entered.detail: dark red wallpaper with intricate black floral patterns covering the walls
large oval copper tub filled with water
folding four-panel lattice screen made of light carved wood
wooden vanity table with round gold-framed mirror and cosmetic bottles
large decorative pottery vessels with narrow necks

segments.scene_description: Entering a private chamber with distinctive red patterned wallpaper, the character observes a copper bathtub, wooden dressing screens, and women engaged in bathing and grooming activities in an intimate setting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cool nighttime courtyard into the warm, intimate depths of a medieval establishment. It begins with the character approaching a brick building across a cobblestone courtyard, moving toward a wooden door illuminated by the glow of stained glass windows. As the camera crosses the threshold, the scene opens into a candlelit main hall filled with wooden bookshelves, heraldic shields, and patrons in medieval attire lounging on patterned carpets. The movement then shifts from the public hall into a private chamber, where the lighting softens against distinctive red patterned wallpaper. Finally, the camera settles in this intimate space, revealing a copper bathtub and wooden dressing screens as women engage in bathing and grooming activities.
